beats.narration_text: Medhavy A-I. From Sanskrit — meaning intelligent, or intellectually brilliant. The perfect name for our A-I-powered intelligent learning systems.

lines: — the perfect name for our AI-powered

beats.narration_text: Here is why Build Quantum Gates on the Bloch Sphere with Claude Code + Manim belongs in your working knowledge. The systems, policies, and tools shaped by it affect decisions at your level — whether or not you understand the mechanism. Knowing the underlying logic gives you the frame; missing it means reasoning from output with no access to the inputs.

lines: — the perfect name for our AI-powered

beats.narration_text: Run it. Two things to verify. First: the Hadamard rotation. State zero starts at the north pole of the Bloch sphere. After H, the vector lies on the equator, pointing along the positive x-axis. That is state plus. Second: the S gate. From the equator, the vector rotates ninety degrees in the equatorial plane to point along the positive y-axis. That is state i. Both rotations are exact. No approximation. Both checks pass.
Medhavy. A-I-powered intelligent learning systems. On YouTube, at Medhavy A-I. Medhavy dot com. From Humanitarians AI.
